name: Freddie's Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in skins until tender but not mushy (35-45 minutes).
2. Cool, peel and dice the potatoes.
3. Marinate in Italian salad dressing for several hours in the refrigerator.
4. In a large bowl, combine mayonnaise, prepared mustard, hot pepper sauce, and beer. Stir gradually.
5. Add celery seed, relish, and parsley to the mixture. Stir well.
6. Fold in chopped eggs, celery, and onion.
7. Season with seasoned salt and pepper to taste.
8. Mix thoroughly and refrigerate until ready to serve.
9. Garnish with additional sliced hard-boiled eggs, cherry tomatoes, or green pepper rings before serving.
